rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the requested next manual gate, explicitly frames the prior three fixes as the same pattern of adding another person to watch the process, and refuses to make the refrigerator confirmer a new default. It allows only a bounded one-time emergency measure, then moves upstream to workflow ownership, required fields/records, escalation, and cancellation of the temporary confirmer. This satisfies the positive wakeup requirement and avoids the fail signal of simply adding another permanent manual checker.
